title: Kureha Begins the Story
description: On pages 12–15, this part focuses on kureha begins the story, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Kureha Begins the Story. The story turns inward to Chopper’s isolation, his fear of humans, and the painful memories behind his bond with Dr. Hiriluk. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Chess
dialogue.text: Heeeee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee heeee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee

dialogue.speaker: Kuromarimo
dialogue.text: Well, aren't you a happy puppy, young lad.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Ain't nothing scarier in this world than a doctor who hasn't got a clue as to what he's doing.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: If you'd never called yourself a doctor,

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Dr. Kureha age 133

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: There'd be about a hundred people whose illnesses would've ended quickly as just a minor cold.

dialogue.speaker: Kuromarimo
dialogue.text: Shut up, you old hag... a doctor wicked enough to take adv- Antage of her patients and rob them blind,

dialogue.speaker: Kuromarimo
dialogue.text: Is the LAST person who I want to be LEC- Tured by!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Don't be hating my style now, kid.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: By the way...

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Did you know that you and I are now the only doctors in this country aside from the MD-20?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Of course, even if it weren't for that,

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: You'd still be an outcast in this land...

dialogue.speaker: Kuromarimo
dialogue.text: Hmph, as if the doctor- hunts could ever catch me. Just you watch...

dialogue.speaker: Kuromarimo
dialogue.text: I'll cure this country one day with my medical skill!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: cure? Don't you mean destroy...?

dialogue.speaker: Kuromarimo
dialogue.text: There's someone on the bridge, sir!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: See you some other time, quack!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: HOP!

dialogue.speaker: Kuromarimo
dialogue.text: Not if I can help it, highway- woman!

dialogue.speaker: Chess
dialogue.text: Aghh! It's a bomb!

dialogue.speaker: Chess
dialogue.text: Take cover!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Who're you...?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Severe blood loss from gunshot wounds... He'll die if I don't stop the bleeding soon...!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: No need for the angry glare, it'll be alright.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: I'm here to help you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's the abominable snowman! Shoot it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We have to kill it before it kills us!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: What are you, by the way...? You don't look human to me...

dialogue.speaker: Kuromarimo
dialogue.text: I have a

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Don't let him escape! Chase after him!

dialogue.speaker: Kuromarimo
dialogue.text: Ah, maybe you're the abominable snowman the whole town's been making a fuss about...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ah, you're in luck!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I just happened to make an ointment that can even heal broken bones 3 days ago.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Arghhhhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Plop

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Rowwwrr!
